generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our alliances keep us safe. Some politicians want to cut defense budgets, but that just shifts the burden to our troops. Strong alliances mean shared responsibility - we can't afford to go it alone. Remember, national security isn't just about military strength; it's about smart partnerships that protect our civil liberties at home. #SupportOurAllies #NationalSecurity
